issues.description: Evidence gathering aborted (partial_honesty_abort) before independent verification could run. All evidence fields (tests, coverage_details, quality_gates, independent_tests) are null - this is ABSENT SIGNAL per Guard #5, not a passing result.
issues.suggestion: Fix the honesty verification issues (test_file format) so evidence gathering can complete and provide independent test verification.

issues.description: Completion promises use pytest node IDs (file::test_function) in test_file fields instead of simple file paths. This caused honesty checker to flag them as missing files. Examples: 'tests/unit/test_mcp_degradation.py::test_store_timeout_returns_unavailable' should be 'tests/unit/test_mcp_degradation.py'
issues.suggestion: In completion_promises, set test_file to just the file path, not the full pytest node ID. Use the node ID format only for test execution, not for file path references.

rationale: Evidence gathering aborted (partial_honesty_abort) before independent verification could run. Per Guard #5 (GATHERING-STATUS GUARD), when gathering_status != 'complete', treat all null fields as ABSENT SIGNAL and do NOT approve. All evidence fields (tests, coverage_details, quality_gates, independent_tests) are null, meaning we have no independent verification of the Player's claims. Additionally, completion_promises contain formatting errors (pytest node IDs instead of file paths in test_file fields), which triggered honesty verification failures. Cannot approve any AC without independent evidence. Player must fix test_file format to allow evidence gathering to complete.
